nasb.text: Then the king of Babylon struck them down and put them to death at Riblah in the land of Hamath. So Judah was led away into exile from its land.

esv.text: And the king of Babylon struck them down and put them to death at Riblah in the land of Hamath. So Judah was taken into exile out of its land.

cnv.text: 巴比倫王擊打他們，在哈馬地的利比拉把他們處死。這樣，猶大人被擄，離開了他們的國土。

ccb.text: 巴比伦王在那里处死了他们。犹大人就这样被掳去，离开了家园。
